title: Sculk Horde: Physarum
description: Flip the script and join the Sculk Horde side.
body:
This is an addon to the Sculk Horde mod.

***

Approaching the tree, you picked an apple, and suddenly, holding it in your hand, you were overcome by a strange feeling. Suddenly, you went to [Zero Coordinates of the World] and found a large underground fortress. Going down, you encountered the core of something, but instead of running away, for some reason you presented him with this fruit, ultimately receiving...

[sdbpxhxcr fepjemfja]

 

The Physarum addon allows you to become part of the [Sculk Horde], enabling you to enjoy all its benefits.

 ̷A̷n̷d̷ ̷n̷o̷t̷ ̷o̷n̷l̷y̷

***

Key Features

*** ### 1\. One with the Horde You are no longer merely a survivor; you are an extension of the Sculk Horde. You possess all their horrifying advantages, but you must also bear their weaknesses. * **XP is your Essence:** Your body rejects normal food. Instead, everything you do—from regenerating health to casting abilities—is fueled directly by your Experience (XP) bar. * **Biological Harvesting:** Your bare hands have mutated, allowing you to quickly tear through infected terrain. Mining these blocks yields Experience Essence to sustain you. Furthermore, you can extract and consume Resin directly from infected beehives. * **Acoustic Camouflage:** To the horde, you are one of their own. Sculk Sensors no longer react to your presence, granting you near-perfect stealth against them and the Warden. * **Horde Synergy:** All Horde Support Units will now recognize you as their vanguard, applying dynamic buffs to you based on their unique abilities. * **Biomass Recycling:** By holding `Shift + RMB` on an infected mob, you can violently deconstruct them back into base components and items. * **AND YES: YOU CAN RIDE AND FLY ON SCULK PHANTOMS!!** ### 2\. The Price of Ascension Your transformation is powerful, but the natural world rejects your new form. * **Corrosive Flesh:** The acidic nature of your hands rapidly erodes normal tools. Using a standard shield is almost impossible, as your touch will destroy its durability in moments. * **Vulnerability to Light:** The _Purity_ effect now burns you just as it burns regular Sculk mobs. * **Purifier's Wrath:** _Infestation Purifiers_ will now target you with debilitating negative effects. You are too mutated to simply disable them by hand—you must physically destroy them. * **An Outcast:** The world fears you. Villagers will tremble and refuse to trade, peaceful animals will flee, and defenders like Iron Golems will attack you on sight. * **Restless Existence:** You can no longer sleep or set your spawn on a regular bed. To anchor yourself to the world, you must use a _Sculk Summoner_ or the newly introduced **Soul Anchor**. * _…And much more to discover._ ### 3\. The Voice in Your Head You are directly linked to the Gravemind. It sees through your eyes and evaluates your worth. Serve it well, and it will reward you. * **The Overseer:** The Gravemind is your constant companion. It will dynamically comment on your actions, guide you through difficult moments, and shape your gameplay. * **Seek Answers:** You can commune with the Gravemind, asking it specific questions to uncover hidden aspects of the gameplay and the dark lore of the infection. * **Evolution Points:** By completing the Gravemind's tasks, you earn Evolution Points. Use them to permanently mutate and upgrade your body, unlock the ability to command Horde squads, or order the Gravemind to scout territories. * **Faith Points:** Show your devotion to earn Faith Points, which can be spent to call down direct, immediate assistance from the Gravemind varying in scale and devastation. ### 4\. Infested Engineering & Rituals Your infected mind can now comprehend and craft structures that sanity would reject. ![image](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1458064/description_783cb901-0513-48c3-8a3b-8c9beb7f4c1d.jpg) ![image](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1458064/description_559c5486-c65f-4591-99b9-44c4a9045682.jpg) ![image](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1458064/description_05df5467-b6f2-491a-8fb9-7697913fd702.jpg) * **The Soul Anchor:** Craft this new block to tether your soul to the physical realm. By right-clicking it, you can set your spawn point absolutely anywhere (even in the Nether!). It must be fueled by _Crying Souls_ to function. * **Node Manifestation:** By holding a _Chunk of Brain_ and sacrificing a massive amount of your own Experience, you can birth an empty _Sculk Node_ frame. Place it within a _Soul Harvester_ to fully power it into a functional Node. * **The Biomass Raid:** Through the Gravemind's quests, you will obtain the **Sculk Beacon**. Place it and feed it a _Mycelium Sprout_ to initiate an enrichment process. Prepare for a brutal defensive battle! If you survive the siege, the beacon will yield **Rich Biomass**, a crucial material for your ultimate physical evolutions. ***  

**Credits:**

Shiba - Textures, Models, Animations.

***

⚠️ Disclaimer

Currently, less than 50% of the planned content has been implemented. Many features are still being refined and improved. Please expect bugs and Work-In-Progress (WIP) elements as we continue to evolve the experience. Stay tuned for future updates!

And yes, it's possible there might be bugs in multiplayer — I haven't fully tested it yet, so proceed with caution!
